gate_results.evidence: Final plan exists, includes Part 3 No-Drop Coverage Matrix, and references V2 in Source Documents table.
Coverage matrix table lists all 22 V2 issue IDs once each; no missing or duplicate IDs in table rows.
Several tasks lack explicit file/module locations or NEEDS VERIFICATION guidance (e.g., T3.6, T4.6–T4.8, T4.11, T5.5).
RT Gates + QA Passes defined with evidence checklist and command templates in PART 5: FINAL QA PLAN.
D-FINAL-01 through D-FINAL-07 specify SoT, stages, agent boundaries, HITL, email ingestion, RAG, auth.
Legacy decommission steps exist but no explicit changelog/CHANGES.md strategy found in plan.
Plan targets unified Postgres truth, UI/agent alignment, email ingestion, RAG consistency, and HITL flows.

risks.detection: Migration report mismatch and sampled field diffs
risks.rollback: Restore JSON/SQLite writes and rerun migration

risks.risk: Legacy writers still active after cutover
risks.detection: File hash changes or CI guard hit
risks.rollback: Disable new writers and restore backups
Disable search_deals or return explicit error

patch_instructions: Add explicit file/module locations or NEEDS VERIFICATION + how to locate for tasks with vague file references (e.g., Phase 3 T3.6, Phase 4 T4.6–T4.8/T4.11, Phase 5 T5.5).
